steps.title: Use the no-solution condition
steps.content: A system of two lines has no solution when the lines have the same slope but different $y$-intercepts. The second line needs slope $\frac{1}{50}$ but an intercept other than $3$.

steps.title: Match the parallel line
steps.content: Rewrite $\frac{1}{25}x=2y$: $$ y=\frac{x}{50} $$ This has slope $\frac{1}{50}$ and intercept $0$, so it is parallel to the given line and distinct. The answer is A.
